mapper.select:
SELECT u.*, CASE c.platform_type WHEN 0 THEN c.username ELSE c.nick_name END AS account, c.nick_name, c.email, c.followers_num, c.platform_type FROM store_celebrity_followup u LEFT JOIN store_celebrity c ON u.celebrity_id = c.id WHERE 1 =1
and c.email like '%${followingUpModel.email}%'
and c.nick_name like '%${followingUpModel.nickName}%'
and c.account like '%${followingUpModel.account}%'
and u.order_ids like '%${followingUpModel.orderIds}%'
and u.waybills like '%${followingUpModel.waybills}%'
and u.feedback_status = #{followingUpModel.feedbackStatus}
and c.platform_type = #{followingUpModel.platformType}
and u.is_shipment = #{followingUpModel.isShipment}
and u.follow_up_status = #{followingUpModel.followUpStatus}
and DATE_FORMAT(u.feedback_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(#{followingUpModel.feedbackDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(u.shipment_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(#{followingUpModel.shipDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(u.follow_up_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(#{followingUpModel.followDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(u.next_follow_up_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(#{followingUpModel.nextFollowDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
